zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert ap Eynon Baynham於1400年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾米其爾迪恩時，他的父親John Baynham20歲，母親Elizabeth of Monmouth20歲。他於大約1420年與Margeret Abrahall在英國英格蘭賀福爾福易結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1436年9月12日在他的家鄉享年36歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾米其爾迪恩聖 邁克爾 安德 哥吉拉 安爾也 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert ap Eynon Baynham于1400年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾米其爾迪恩时，他的父亲John Baynham20岁，母亲Elizabeth of Monmouth20岁。他于大约1420年与Margeret Abrahall在英国英格兰賀福爾福易结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1436年9月12日在他的家乡享年36岁，埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾米其爾迪恩聖 邁克爾 安德 哥吉拉 安爾也 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: from a short form of the personal name Adelhard, which is of ancient Germanic origin, composed of the elements adal ‘noble’ + hard ‘bold, hardy’. Compare Ale and Alma 4.

variants.name: Ale
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos Enrique, Cesar, Jose, Maria De Jesus.
Italian (Sicily; Alé): probably a variant of Aleo .

nameMeanings.name: Eynon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: from Enniaun, an old Welsh personal name ultimately derived from Late Latin Annianus, but also associated with Welsh einion ‘anvil’, taken as implying stability and fortitude. See also Beynon and compare Onion .

variants.name: Hennion
meanings: Welsh: from a hypercorrected form of the Welsh personal name Ennion, see Eynon .
Flemish and French (mainly Nord): from a pet form of the personal name Henri or Jehen (see Jean ).

variants.name: Bennion
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh ap Einion, ap Eynon ‘son of Einion’ (see Eynon ).

variants.name: Binion
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh ap Einion, ap Eynon ‘son of Einion’. See Eynon and compare Bennion . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Kenyon
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from a place near Warrington, which is of uncertain etymology. There was formerly an ancient burial mound there and Ekwall has speculated that the name is a shortened form of a British name composed of the elements crūc ‘mound’ + a personal name cognate with Welsh Einion (see Eynon ).

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Coinín ‘son of Coinín’, a byname based on a diminutive of cano ‘wolf’, also Anglicized as Canning and Cunneen . The similarity to the borrowed word coinín ‘coney, rabbit’ has sometimes caused this name to be Anglicized as Rabbitt .
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Fhinghin, ‘son of Finghen’, a personal name meaning ‘fair-born’.

nameMeanings.name: Baynham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh and English (West Midlands): variant of Welsh   Bennion  .

variants.name: Bennion
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh ap Einion, ap Eynon ‘son of Einion’ (see Eynon ).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert ap Eynon Baynham was born in 1400, in Mitcheldean, Gloucestershire, England, his father, John Baynham, was 20 and his mother, Elizabeth of Monmouth, was 20. He married Margeret Abrahall about 1420, in Foy, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 12 September 1436, in his hometown, at the age of 36, and was buried in St Michael And All Angels' Church, Mitcheldean, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert ap Eynon Baynham est né en 1400, à Mitcheldean, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, John Baynham, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth of Monmouth, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Margeret Abrahall environ 1420, à Foy, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 12 septembre 1436, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterré à St Michael And All Angels' Church, Mitcheldean, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Lui sposato Margeret Abrahall circa 1420, nel Foy, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. ko.lifeSummary: Robert ap Eynon Baynham(이)가 1400년 영국 그루스스터실르 미트헬디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Baynham(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth of Monmouth(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1420년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 포이에서 Margeret Abrahall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1436년 9월 12일 그의 고향에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 미트헬디 스트 믹하얼 앤드 앨 앤그스' c후르치에 묻혔다.

ru.St. Michael and all Angels Churchyard, M: ст мачаел анд алл ангелс' чурч, мичелдин, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert ap Eynon Baynham родился в 1400 г. в местности мичелдин, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Baynham было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth of Monmouth, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Margeret Abrahall около 1420 г. в местности фои, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 12 сентября 1436 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 36 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мачаел анд алл ангелс' чурч, мичелдин, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Margeret Abrahall aproximadamente 1420, en Foy, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 12 de septiembre de 1436, en su pueblo, a la edad de 36 años, y fue sepultado en St Michael And All Angels' Church, Mitcheldean, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
